articles.title: Cardano’s Hoskinson Turns Bullish On Bitcoin, Predicts BTC DeFi Will Eclipse That Of Ethereum And Solana
articles.description: Despite the Bitcoin network’s lackluster speeds and a sub-optimal user experience, Cardano's Hoskinson is super optimistic about DeFi in the Bitcoin ecosystem.

articles.title: Cardano Founder Reveals Epic Bitcoin Plan: Details
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson predicts that DeFi coming to Bitcoin, and it will dwarf anything Solana and Ethereum have done
